meta.dataset_name: Signal Commons deterministic fictional demo dataset
meta.warning: Every company, signal, and source in this file is fictional. Display a Demo data notice wherever these records are rendered.

companies.name: CivicLens Demo
companies.summary: Turns public proceedings into searchable, explainable policy records.
companies.why_it_matters: This fictional example demonstrates how Signal Commons explains potential relevance in politics & civic technology without presenting demo content as fact.

companies.name: BallotBridge Demo
companies.summary: Organizes public election information into accessible voter guides.
companies.why_it_matters: This fictional example demonstrates how Signal Commons explains potential relevance in politics & civic technology without presenting demo content as fact.

companies.name: PublicSignal Demo
companies.summary: Detects changes across public notices and legislative records.
companies.why_it_matters: This fictional example demonstrates how Signal Commons explains potential relevance in politics & civic technology without presenting demo content as fact.

companies.name: PermitFlow Demo
companies.summary: Supports local permitting intake and case routing.
companies.why_it_matters: This fictional example demonstrates how Signal Commons explains potential relevance in government operations without presenting demo content as fact.

companies.name: County Pilot Demo
companies.summary: Helps public agencies coordinate resident service requests.
companies.why_it_matters: This fictional example demonstrates how Signal Commons explains potential relevance in government operations without presenting demo content as fact.

companies.name: ServiceMap Demo
companies.summary: Maps government programs and eligibility pathways.
companies.why_it_matters: This fictional example demonstrates how Signal Commons explains potential relevance in government operations without presenting demo content as fact.

companies.name: AgriScout Demo

companies.name: SoilWise Demo

companies.name: HarvestOps Demo

companies.name: ClinicCoPilot Demo

companies.why_it_matters: This fictional example demonstrates how Signal Commons explains potential relevance in healthcare without presenting demo content as fact.

companies.name: CareAccess Demo

companies.name: GrantBridge Demo
companies.summary: Matches nonprofit needs with relevant grant opportunities.

signals.headline: Demo product workflow announced
signals.summary: A fictional product launch is included to exercise the research and evidence interface.
signals.why_it_matters: It provides a safe deterministic record for testing evidence labels, timelines, filters, and review states.

evidence.supporting_passage: This is intentionally fictional demo evidence and must not be represented as a real-world claim.
